page_content:
BIOE614 Macroscale Biomechanics (3 Credits)

An overview of current problems in movement biomechanics. Topics covered include muscle mechanics, joint mechanics, EMG and EEG signal applications, ultrasonography and elastography, anthropometry, human movement 3-D kinematics, inverse dynamics, forward dynamics, work, power and energy. Biomechanics tools will be used to investigate clinical problems. Students will also do research projects on related topics. Jointly offered with: BIOE414.
